14.cultural_biological: Deep plow the soil during autumn or winter to expose grubs to birds and cold weather.
14.chemical_direct: Apply Metarhizium anisopliae bio-insecticide or mix Chlorpyrifos granules into the soil.

15.cultural_biological: Flood fields to force crickets to the surface for manual collection or bird predation.
15.chemical_direct: Deploy toxic baits mixed with Trichlorfon or apply Imidacloprid into tunnels.

16.cultural_biological: Implement intensive crop rotation with non-host plants and optimize summer fallow tilling.
16.chemical_direct: Use Bifenthrin or Clothianidin as a seed coat or pre-planting soil treatment.

17.cultural_biological: Deploy light traps to catch adult moths and manually crush egg clusters.
17.chemical_direct: Spray Lambda-Cyhalothrin or Chlorantraniliprole during larval outbreaks.

18.cultural_biological: Remove weeds 10-14 days before planting to starve young larvae.
18.chemical_direct: Apply synthetic pyrethroid sprays (e.g., Deltamethrin) or bran baits late in the evening.

19.cultural_biological: Utilize physical barriers around high-value seedlings and implement deep mechanical tilling.
19.chemical_direct: Apply targeted applications of Indoxacarb or Chlorfenapyr to the base of plants.

20.cultural_biological: Keep field boundaries completely clean of host weeds; utilize structural row covers.
20.chemical_direct: Deploy molasses-pesticide baits or spray Emamectin Benzoate around affected clusters.

21.cultural_biological: Introduce predatory mites (Phytoseiidae) and maintain overhead sprinkler irrigation to wash them away.
21.chemical_direct: Spray specific acaricides like Abamectin, Spirodiclofen, or Hexythiazox.

22.cultural_biological: Plant resistant hybrids and release Trichogramma ostriniae wasps at initial egg laying.
22.chemical_direct: Apply Bacillus thuringiensis (Bt) granules or spray Chlorantraniliprole into the whorls.

23.cultural_biological: Dig deep defensive trenches around fields to stop migrating crawls; protect bird populations.
23.chemical_direct: Spray Methomyl, Flubendiamide, or Spinosad evenly across the crop canopy.

24.cultural_biological: Conserve ladybug beetles and lacewings; blast small infestations with high-pressure water.
24.chemical_direct: Apply Imidacloprid, Thiamethoxam, or Flonicamid systemic sprays.
